title: Move version badge off top-right (overlapped page actions) into sidebar bottom, bigger font
originDiscussion: v0.4.7 added a floating top-right badge; operator screenshot showed it overlapping the `/databases` page's '新增資料庫' button (visually distracting + click-blocking concern). Operator asked to relocate to the sidebar user-menu area at bottom-left and bump the font size.
changes: Removed: floating absolute-positioned badge from AppShell
Removed: previous tiny 10px version line at sidebar top (under DinoPanel logo)
Added: version line just below UserMenu at sidebar bottom — text-sm muted-foreground, only when sidebar is expanded
Same single source: still reads APP_VERSION from @/lib/version (Vite-injected from package.json)
